/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zip_read_file_fuzzer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zip_read_file_fuzzer.dir/zip_read_file_fuzzer.c.o CMakeFiles/zip_read_file_fuzzer.dir/fuzz_main.c.o -o zip_read_file_fuzzer  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jensen/lab/Shuriken-Analyzer/build/_deps/libzip-build/lib ../lib/libzip.so.5.5
